Workflow Advisor
✦ Powered by AI

Try These Examples

Send a message to resident when a high priority meld is created
Assign a coordinator when a meld is created by a tenant
Delay 2 hours then send a message if meld status is open
Add a tag when a meld is completed and tenant rated it poorly
Notify when an invoice is submitted over a certain amount
Unassign a meld if it hasn't been scheduled within 3 days

How It Works

Describe your automation goal in your own words. The advisor will recommend a Trigger, Conditions, and Action based on your goal — always review before activating.

Legend

Trigger
Condition
Action

Definitions

▼
TriggerThe event that starts the workflow (e.g. Meld Created, Invoice Submitted)
ConditionA filter that must be true for the workflow to continue (e.g. Priority is High)
ActionWhat the workflow does (e.g. Send Message, Assign Meld, Add Tags)
DelayPauses the workflow for a set time before the next action fires
ANDAll conditions in a block must be true
OREither condition block can trigger the action independently

Meld Workflow Advisor

Describe what you want your workflow to do in your own words, and I'll suggest how to build it in Property Meld — trigger, conditions, and action.

Press Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line · Be specific about what triggers the workflow and what should happen
AI suggestions may not always be perfect. Always review your workflow before activating it in Property Meld.

If you need additional assistance with your workflows, please contact the Property Meld Support team.
